message:
ci: Build CPython from source with pinned v3.13.1 tag

Replace actions/setup-python with custom build-cpython action that
builds CPython from source using a pinned tag (v3.13.1). This ensures
reproducible CI runs regardless of what patch version setup-python
decides to install.

Changes:
- Add .github/actions/build-cpython/ composite action
- Build CPython with --enable-optimizations and --with-lto
- Cache builds per OS/arch to avoid rebuilding on each run
- Update all CPython test jobs to use build-cpython
- Add Python version verification step
- Increase timeouts to account for initial build time

The first run will be slower (~15-20 min to build CPython) but
subsequent runs will hit the cache and be as fast as before.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,166 @@
+name: 'Build CPython from Source'
+description: 'Build CPython from pinned commit for reproducible CI'
+inputs:
+  os:
+    description: 'Operating system (linux, macos, windows)'
+    required: true
+    default: 'linux'
+
+outputs:
+  python-path:
+    description: 'Path to the built Python executable'
+    value: ${{ steps.set-output.outputs.python-path || steps.set-output-win.outputs.python-path }}
+
+runs:
+  using: 'composite'
+  steps:
+    # =========================================================================
+    # Cache CPython build to avoid rebuilding every time
+    # =========================================================================
+    - name: Cache CPython build (Linux/macOS)
+      if: inputs.os != 'windows'
+      uses: actions/cache@v4
+      id: cpython-cache
+      with:
+        path: ~/cpython-install
+        key: cpython-3.13.1-${{ inputs.os }}-${{ runner.arch }}
+
+    - name: Cache CPython build (Windows)
+      if: inputs.os == 'windows'
+      uses: actions/cache@v4
+      id: cpython-cache-win
+      with:
+        path: C:\cpython-install
+        key: cpython-3.13.1-windows-${{ runner.arch }}
+
+    # =========================================================================
+    # Build CPython from source (Linux)
+    # =========================================================================
+    - name: Build CPython (Linux)
+      if: inputs.os == 'linux' && steps.cpython-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        set -e
+
+        # Install build dependencies
+        sudo apt-get update -qq
+        sudo apt-get install -qq -y \
+          build-essential \
+          libssl-dev \
+          zlib1g-dev \
+          libncurses5-dev \
+          libncursesw5-dev \
+          libreadline-dev \
+          libsqlite3-dev \
+          libgdbm-dev \
+          libdb5.3-dev \
+          libbz2-dev \
+          libexpat1-dev \
+          liblzma-dev \
+          tk-dev \
+          libffi-dev \
+          uuid-dev
+
+        # Clone CPython at pinned commit (v3.13.1)
+        git clone --depth 1 --branch v3.13.1 https://github.com/python/cpython.git ~/cpython-src
+        cd ~/cpython-src
+
+        # Configure with optimizations
+        ./configure --prefix=$HOME/cpython-install --enable-optimizations --with-lto
+
+        # Build (use all available cores)
+        make -j$(nproc)
+        make install
+
+        # Ensure pip is installed
+        $HOME/cpython-install/bin/python3 -m ensurepip --upgrade
+
+        # Cleanup source to save space
+        rm -rf ~/cpython-src
+
+    # =========================================================================
+    # Build CPython from source (macOS)
+    # =========================================================================
+    - name: Build CPython (macOS)
+      if: inputs.os == 'macos' && steps.cpython-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        set -e
+
+        # Install build dependencies via Homebrew
+        brew install openssl readline sqlite3 xz zlib tcl-tk
+
+        # Clone CPython at pinned commit (v3.13.1)
+        git clone --depth 1 --branch v3.13.1 https://github.com/python/cpython.git ~/cpython-src
+        cd ~/cpython-src
+
+        # Configure with Homebrew paths
+        export LDFLAGS="-L$(brew --prefix openssl)/lib -L$(brew --prefix readline)/lib -L$(brew --prefix sqlite3)/lib -L$(brew --prefix zlib)/lib"
+        export CPPFLAGS="-I$(brew --prefix openssl)/include -I$(brew --prefix readline)/include -I$(brew --prefix sqlite3)/include -I$(brew --prefix zlib)/include"
+
+        ./configure --prefix=$HOME/cpython-install --enable-optimizations --with-openssl=$(brew --prefix openssl)
+
+        # Build (use all available cores)
+        make -j$(sysctl -n hw.ncpu)
+        make install
+
+        # Ensure pip is installed
+        $HOME/cpython-install/bin/python3 -m ensurepip --upgrade
+
+        # Cleanup source
+        rm -rf ~/cpython-src
+
+    # =========================================================================
+    # Build CPython from source (Windows)
+    # =========================================================================
+    - name: Build CPython (Windows)
+      if: inputs.os == 'windows' && steps.cpython-cache-win.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
+      shell: pwsh
+      run: |
+        # Clone CPython at pinned commit (v3.13.1)
+        git clone --depth 1 --branch v3.13.1 https://github.com/python/cpython.git C:\cpython-src
+        Set-Location C:\cpython-src\PCbuild
+
+        # Get external dependencies (for ssl, etc.)
+        .\get_externals.bat
+
+        # Build using the provided script
+        .\build.bat -p x64
+
+        # Create install directory and copy binaries
+        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path C:\cpython-install
+        Copy-Item C:\cpython-src\PCbuild\amd64\python.exe C:\cpython-install\
+        Copy-Item C:\cpython-src\PCbuild\amd64\python*.dll C:\cpython-install\
+        Copy-Item C:\cpython-src\PCbuild\amd64\*.pyd C:\cpython-install\
+        Copy-Item -Recurse C:\cpython-src\Lib C:\cpython-install\Lib
+
+        # Ensure pip is installed
+        C:\cpython-install\python.exe -m ensurepip --upgrade
+
+        # Cleanup source
+        Remove-Item -Recurse -Force C:\cpython-src
+
+    # =========================================================================
+    # Set up PATH and output
+    # =========================================================================
+    - name: Set Python path (Linux/macOS)
+      if: inputs.os != 'windows'
+      id: set-output
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        echo "$HOME/cpython-install/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
+        echo "python-path=$HOME/cpython-install/bin/python3" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+        # Verify installation
+        $HOME/cpython-install/bin/python3 --version
+
+    - name: Set Python path (Windows)
+      if: inputs.os == 'windows'
+      id: set-output-win
+      shell: pwsh
+      run: |
+        "C:\cpython-install" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_PATH
+        "python-path=C:\cpython-install\python.exe" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+        # Verify installation
+        C:\cpython-install\python.exe --version

@@ -18,12 +18,28 @@ runs:
     # =========================================================================
     # Setup: Install dependencies for consistent test environment
     # =========================================================================
+    - name: Verify Python version
+      shell: bash
+      if: inputs.os != 'windows'
+      run: |
+        echo "Using Python:"
+        python3 --version
+        which python3
+
+    - name: Verify Python version (Windows)
+      shell: pwsh
+      if: inputs.os == 'windows'
+      run: |
+        Write-Host "Using Python:"
+        python --version
+        Get-Command python
+
     - name: Install test dependencies (Linux)
       if: inputs.os == 'linux'
       shell: bash
       run: |
         # Install packages needed by various CPython tests
-        pip install --quiet tzdata
+        python3 -m pip install --quiet tzdata
         # Install system packages for dbm, etc.
         sudo apt-get update -qq
         sudo apt-get install -qq -y libgdbm-dev libdb-dev || true
@@ -32,13 +48,13 @@ runs:
       if: inputs.os == 'macos'
       shell: bash
       run: |
-        pip install --quiet tzdata
+        python3 -m pip install --quiet tzdata
 
     - name: Install test dependencies (Windows)
       if: inputs.os == 'windows'
       shell: pwsh
       run: |
-        pip install --quiet tzdata
+        python -m pip install --quiet tzdata
 
     # =========================================================================
     # Run tests with verbose mode to capture actual errors

@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ on:
 
 env:
   ZIG_VERSION: "0.15.2"
+  CPYTHON_VERSION: "v3.13.1"  # Pinned commit: 067145177975eadd61a0c907d0d177f7b6a5a3de
 
 concurrency:
   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
@@ -197,14 +198,14 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-core1:
     name: CPython @core1 (46 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
-    timeout-minutes: 30
+    timeout-minutes: 45
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           submodules: true
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/build-cpython
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          os: "linux"
       - uses: ./.github/actions/run-cpython-tests
         with:
           group: "core1"
@@ -215,14 +216,14 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-core2:
     name: CPython @core2 (46 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
-    timeout-minutes: 30
+    timeout-minutes: 45
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           submodules: true
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/build-cpython
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          os: "linux"
       - uses: ./.github/actions/run-cpython-tests
         with:
           group: "core2"
@@ -233,14 +234,14 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-core3:
     name: CPython @core3 (46 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
-    timeout-minutes: 30
+    timeout-minutes: 45
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           submodules: true
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/build-cpython
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          os: "linux"
       - uses: ./.github/actions/run-cpython-tests
         with:
           group: "core3"
@@ -251,14 +252,14 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-core4:
     name: CPython @core4 (46 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
-    timeout-minutes: 30
+    timeout-minutes: 45
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           submodules: true
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/build-cpython
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          os: "linux"
       - uses: ./.github/actions/run-cpython-tests
         with:
           group: "core4"
@@ -269,14 +270,14 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-core5:
     name: CPython @core5 (46 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
-    timeout-minutes: 30
+    timeout-minutes: 45
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           submodules: true
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/build-cpython
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          os: "linux"
       - uses: ./.github/actions/run-cpython-tests
         with:
           group: "core5"
@@ -287,14 +288,14 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-core6:
     name: CPython @core6 (51 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
-    timeout-minutes: 30
+    timeout-minutes: 45
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           submodules: true
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/build-cpython
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          os: "linux"
       - uses: ./.github/actions/run-cpython-tests
         with:
           group: "core6"
@@ -305,14 +306,14 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-linux:
     name: CPython @linux (28 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
-    timeout-minutes: 75
+    timeout-minutes: 90
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           submodules: true
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/build-cpython
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          os: "linux"
       - uses: ./.github/actions/run-cpython-tests
         with:
           group: "linux"
@@ -323,14 +324,14 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-macos:
     name: CPython @macos (25 tests)
     runs-on: macos-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 45
+    timeout-minutes: 90
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           submodules: true
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/build-cpython
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          os: "macos"
       - uses: ./.github/actions/run-cpython-tests
         with:
           group: "macos"
@@ -341,14 +342,14 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-windows:
     name: CPython @windows (85 tests)
     runs-on: windows-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 60
+    timeout-minutes: 120
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           submodules: true
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/build-cpython
         with:
-          python-version: "3.12"
+          os: "windows"
       - uses: ./.github/actions/run-cpython-tests
         with:
           group: "windows"
